ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "emp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "doj" TEXT /* Date of joining the company */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the employee (e.g., SE, SSE, TPL) */,
  "dept_no" INTEGER /* Department number the employee belongs to */,
  "workgroup_category" INTEGER /* Workgroup category the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_no FOREIGN KEY ("dept_no") REFERENCES departments ("dept_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_workgroup_category FOREIGN KEY ("workgroup_category") REFERENCES workgroups ("workgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., network, protocol, security) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation (e.g., SE, SSE, TPL) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workgroups" (
  "workgroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workgroup */,
  "workgroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the workgroup (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workgroup */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workgroup lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workgroup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workgroups_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the project */,
  "project_code" INTEGER /* Code of the project the employee is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was assigned to the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's assignment to the project ended */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked on the project */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating for the project assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_code FOREIGN KEY ("project_code") REFERENCES projects ("project_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance percentage of the employee */,
  "utilization" INTEGER /* Utilization percentage of the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "goals_met" INTEGER /* Number of goals met by the employee */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the performance review */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Overall performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, department manager, employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR, department manager, employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the role */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
